# This test verifies that MMA repair swaps misplaced voters to satisfy
# voter_constraints. All 10 ranges have 3 voters in region a, but
# voter_constraints require 2 voters in region b. MMA should swap 2 voters
# from region a to region b per range, keeping the leaseholder (s1) in a.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges satisfy voter_constraints, no violating ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b) nodes_per_region=(3,3)
----

# All voters initially in region a (s1-s3).
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=3 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3}:1
----

# Require 2 of 3 voters in region b.
set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=3 voter_constraints={'+region=b':2}
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

assertion type=conformance violating=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
